title: Eterna
description: Something new for the old veterans. Fun mods based around adventure, exploration, and immersion, with old favorites and just a few quality of life mods.
body:
## Eterna 
is a little project of mine for my friends. It's all about bringing the spark back into playing minecraft with your buddies like the good 'ol days. I've found that this spark comes from cool mods, higher difficulty, more endgame content, and a lot of required exploration to progress, slowing down the classic gameplay loop.


<details>
<summary>Mods
</summary>
